creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Jp-mule-canna (and probably all mule's) doesn't compile as ione of the modules tries to link cuserid() which is obsolete (according to cuserid(1)).

Are you sure you have the most recent port?  It should be fixed in
patches/patch-ac:

===
revision 1.4
date: 1997/04/09 07:24:38;  author: asami;  state: Exp;  lines: +9 -0
Make the emacs/mule ports compile when __FreeBSD__ == 3.  Closes PR
ports/3175.
===

At any rate, isn't this a duplicate of PR 3175?

Satoshi
